name: Cream Cheese-Pumpkin Dessert Dip
recipeIngredient: 1 can pumpkin pie mix (not solid-pack pumpkin)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the cream cheese in a mixing bowl until smooth.
2. Gradually add the pumpkin pie mix and beat well.
3. Add the sugar, spices, and orange rind; beat until smooth.
4. Serve as a dip or spread with your favorite spice cookies, oatmeal cookies, molasses cookies, or gingersnaps.
Yield: 3 cups dip.
